Video.summary: Learn how to play this ancient game and discover why a 20th-century innovation has made all the difference.

Video.summary: Discover how this ancient game of strategy wound its way westward.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Board Games of the Ancient World

Video.summary: While the westward development of chaturanga into chess is fairly well documented, its eastward route is somewhat murky.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Board Games of the Ancient World
